description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image and a postgres:14.8 service, sets POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD to trust, and runs a before_script that prints the Python version, creates a virtual environment, activates it, and installs CI requirements from a custom index. Define a single test job (stage test) that inherits the before_script and then exports DATABASE_HOST=postgres, DATABASE_PASS=, DATABASE_PORT=, DATABASE_USER=postgres, DOMAIN=dev, LOG_FOLDER=, LOG_SUFFIX=dev, MAILGUN_SERVER_NAME=test.net, STRIPE_PUBLISH_KEY=\"pk_test\", STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=\"sk_test\", USE_OPENID_CONNECT=False, and finally runs pytest --create-db --cov-report term --cov=base. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
